headline: Idex (IEX) Down 3.6% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Idex (IEX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 4 Industrial Manufacturing Stocks to Gain on Robust Industry Trends
summary: Rising manufacturing activity, technological advancements and strategic acquisitions are supporting the near-term outlook of the Zacks Manufacturing - General Industrial industry. RBC, IEX, WTS and HLIO are some promising stocks in the industry.
